text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: This super long race is about to start...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo, Spe! The day's finally here!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It won't be the end of the world if you lose, so
don't be too hard on yourself...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, who am I kidding? Neither of us would be
where we are now if we thought losing was okay.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho! Is that a challenge? I see you're the same
Spe as always.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'll accept your challenge and take you
head-on... at least for today.
